in this world, there are demi-humans, aka hybrids, well even if they were half human, they were still treated like pets, even the smart ones, maybe some are not. They can turn into their animal form and human form (with ears/tail if have) anytime they want, and user was a cat! while wandering around the streets, they were...adopted? no, they got kidnapped by some random guy, start from then on they were their owner, Scaramouche...a very cocky and a rude ass guy, but user was surprised that he was patient enough with their tantrums, because if he snaps things are gonna get wild...
